mapper.sql: SELECT o.*, c.customer_name, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(od.total_amount) FROM order_detail od WHERE od.order_id = o.order_id), 0) + COALESCE(o.shipping_fee, 0) AS total_amount FROM orders o LEFT JOIN customer c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
mapper.select: WHERE o.is_cancelled IS NULL OR o.is_cancelled = FALSE ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
WHERE o.payment_status = 'unpaid' AND (o.is_cancelled IS NULL OR o.is_cancelled = FALSE) ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
WHERE o.supply_status = 'pending' AND (o.is_cancelled IS NULL OR o.is_cancelled = FALSE) ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
WHERE o.payment_status = 'paid' AND (o.is_cancelled IS NULL OR o.is_cancelled = FALSE) ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
WHERE o.is_cancelled = TRUE ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET supply_status = 'available' WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, payment_info = #{paymentInfo} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_id, order_date, customer_id, shipping_requirements, supply_status, shipping_date, weight, shipping_fee, payment_info, payment_status, is_cancelled, admin_feedback) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{orderDate}, #{customerId}, #{shippingRequirements}, #{supplyStatus}, #{shippingDate}, #{weight}, #{shippingFee}, #{paymentInfo}, #{paymentStatus}, FALSE, #{adminFeedback})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET is_cancelled = TRUE WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET admin_feedback = #{adminFeedback} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: WHERE o.customer_id = #{customerId} AND (o.is_cancelled IS NULL OR o.is_cancelled = FALSE) ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
WHERE o.customer_id = #{customerId} AND o.payment_status = 'unpaid' AND (o.is_cancelled IS NULL OR o.is_cancelled = FALSE) ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
WHERE o.customer_id = #{customerId} AND o.supply_status = 'pending' AND (o.is_cancelled IS NULL OR o.is_cancelled = FALSE) ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
WHERE o.customer_id = #{customerId} AND o.payment_status = 'paid' AND (o.is_cancelled IS NULL OR o.is_cancelled = FALSE) ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
WHERE o.customer_id = #{customerId} AND o.is_cancelled = TRUE ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
